glosses.ja: 指名する; 指定する

sentences.target: On désigne un remplaçant ce soir.

translations.fr: On désigne un remplaçant ce soir.
translations.en: We are appointing a substitute tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche nombramos a un suplente.
translations.de: Heute Abend bestimmen wir einen Ersatzspieler.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚指定一名替补。
translations.pt: Hoje à noite nomeamos um substituto.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi chỉ định một cầu thủ dự bị.
translations.nl: Vanavond wijzen we een invaller aan.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми призначаємо запасного гравця.
translations.hi: आज रात हम एक बदली खिलाड़ी नियुक्त कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ ορίζουμε έναν αναπληρωματικό.
translations.nb: I kveld utpeker vi en innbytter.
translations.id: Malam ini kami menunjuk seorang pemain cadangan.
translations.sv: I kväll utser vi en avbytare.
translations.ro: În seara asta desemnăm un jucător de rezervă.
translations.da: I aften udpeger vi en indskifter.
translations.ja: 今夜、控え選手を指名します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person singular, often meaning generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'); syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); transitive, selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determiners the following noun.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of the verb 'désigne'.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying the temporal noun 'soir'.
Temporal noun (masculine singular); with its determiner forms the adverbial time phrase 'ce soir'.

sentences.target: Nous désignons Marie comme chef d'équipe.

translations.fr: Nous désignons Marie comme chef d'équipe.
translations.en: We are appointing Marie as team leader.
translations.es: Nombramos a Marie líder del equipo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们任命玛丽为团队负责人。
translations.he: אנחנו ממנים את מארי לראש צוות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bổ nhiệm Marie làm trưởng nhóm.
translations.hi: हम मैरी को टीम लीडर नियुक्त कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ορίζουμε τη Μαρί επικεφαλής της ομάδας.
translations.id: Kami menunjuk Marie sebagai pemimpin tim.
translations.ro: O numim pe Marie lider de echipă.
translations.ja: 私たちはマリーをチームリーダーに任命します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person plural); syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb (present indicative, 1st person plural); transitive, taking 'Marie' as direct object and a role complement introduced by 'comme'.
Proper noun; direct object (the person being designated).
Preposition meaning 'as'; introduces a predicative complement specifying the role assigned.
Common noun (masculine singular); complement of the preposition 'comme' (role title).
Preposition 'de' with elision before vowel; links 'chef' to its complement 'équipe' ('chef d'équipe').
Common noun (feminine singular); complement of 'de' within the noun phrase 'chef d'équipe'.

sentences.target: Je dois désigner un responsable aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je dois désigner un responsable aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I have to appoint a person in charge today.
translations.es: Hoy tengo que nombrar a un responsable.
translations.de: Ich muss heute eine verantwortliche Person bestimmen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天必须指定一位负责人。
translations.yue: 我今日要委任一位負責人。
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải chỉ định một người phụ trách.
translations.nl: Vandaag moet ik een verantwoordelijke aanstellen.
translations.hi: आज मुझे एक जिम्मेदार व्यक्ति नियुक्त करना है.
translations.el: Σήμερα πρέπει να ορίσω έναν υπεύθυνο.
translations.nb: I dag må jeg utpeke en ansvarlig.
translations.id: Hari ini saya harus menunjuk seorang penanggung jawab.
translations.sv: I dag måste jag utse en ansvarig.
translations.ro: Astăzi trebuie să desemnez un responsabil.
translations.da: I dag skal jeg udpege en ansvarlig.
translations.ja: 今日は責任者を任命しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); syntactic subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present indicative, 1st person singular); selects an infinitive ('désigner') expressing obligation.
Infinitive verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of the modal 'dois'.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determiners the following noun.
Common noun; direct object of 'désigner'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate time.

sentences.target: Ils désignent la table près de la fenêtre.
sentences.reading: /il deziɲ la tabl pʁɛ də la fənɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Ils désignent la table près de la fenêtre.
translations.ipa: /il deziɲ la tabl pʁɛ də la fənɛtʁ/
translations.en: They point out the table near the window.
translations.es: Señalan la mesa junto a la ventana.
translations.de: Sie zeigen auf den Tisch am Fenster.
translations.it: Indicano il tavolo vicino alla finestra.
translations.ru: Они указывают на стол у окна.
translations.pt: Eles apontam para a mesa perto da janela.
translations.he: הם מצביעים על השולחן ליד החלון.
translations.vi: Họ chỉ vào chiếc bàn gần cửa sổ.
translations.ar: هم يشيرون إلى الطاولة القريبة من النافذة.
translations.nl: Ze wijzen de tafel bij het raam aan.
translations.uk: Вони вказують на стіл біля вікна.
translations.hi: वे खिड़की के पास वाली मेज़ की ओर इशारा करते हैं.
translations.el: Δείχνουν το τραπέζι κοντά στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: De peker på bordet ved vinduet.
translations.id: Mereka menunjuk meja di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: De pekar på bordet vid fönstret.
translations.ro: Ei indică masa de lângă fereastră.
translations.da: De peger på bordet ved vinduet.
translations.fi: He osoittavat ikkunan vieressä olevan pöydän.
translations.ja: 彼らは窓際のテーブルを指さします。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural); syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural); transitive, taking 'la table' as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) determiners the noun 'table'.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of the verb.
Preposition forming part of the complex preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'; introduces a locative phrase.
Preposition; second element of 'près de', linking to the noun phrase 'la fenêtre'.
Definite article (feminine singular) determiners the noun 'fenêtre'.
Common noun (feminine singular); complement of the preposition 'de' within the locative prepositional phrase.
